mnemonics.title: Physical Disk Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: "Platters Spin, Tracks Circle, Sectors Store" — Platters are the physical discs, tracks are concentric circles on each surface, and sectors are the smallest storage units on a track.

mnemonics.title: LBA Mapping Order
mnemonics.content: "Sectors → Heads → Cylinders" (SHC) — Logical blocks fill all sectors on a track first, then move to the next head (surface), then to the next cylinder. Think "Small → Head → Cylinder" (smallest to biggest).

mnemonics.title: CAV vs CLV
mnemonics.content: "CAV = Constant spin, All tracks Same sectors. CLV = Changes speed, Longer tracks get More sectors." HDDs use CAV, CDs/DVDs use CLV.
